scenario: Correction 3 (finding->run joins FAIL CLOSED: source_run_id must equal run_id AND reviewed tree + baseline_tree_id must be present) and correction 4 (a transient artifact is prunable ONLY after its owning run is terminal/reaped/abandoned).
note: Contract predicates under test are PURE. run/finding shapes mirror the on-disk findings-result.json + review-run.json field names.

finding_join_cases.name: valid-join
finding_join_cases.why: source_run_id equals run_id, and both the reviewed tree and baseline_tree_id are present.

finding_join_cases.name: mismatched-source-run-id-fails-closed
finding_join_cases.why: a finding whose source_run_id does not equal the run's run_id is a cross-run smuggle; the join is rejected.

finding_join_cases.name: missing-reviewed-tree-fails-closed
finding_join_cases.why: no reviewed tree identity on the run — the finding cannot be bound to a tree; fail closed.

finding_join_cases.name: missing-baseline-fails-closed
finding_join_cases.why: no baseline_tree_id — the finding cannot be bound to a baseline; fail closed.

finding_join_cases.name: status-json-spelling-tolerated
finding_join_cases.why: the status.json spelling reviewed_digest_tree_id is accepted for the reviewed tree identity.

disposition_cases.name: transient-running-not-prunable
disposition_cases.why: correction 4: a transient artifact is NOT prunable while its owning run is running.

disposition_cases.name: transient-unknown-not-prunable
disposition_cases.why: fail-safe: an unknown owning-run state does not authorize pruning.

disposition_cases.name: transient-terminal-prunable
disposition_cases.why: prunable only after the owning run is terminal.

disposition_cases.name: transient-reaped-prunable
disposition_cases.why: reaped counts as terminal for pruning.

disposition_cases.name: transient-abandoned-prunable
disposition_cases.why: an explicitly abandoned run's transient artifacts are prunable.

disposition_cases.name: durable-latest
disposition_cases.why: current evidence for a live lineage.

disposition_cases.name: durable-obsolete-retain
disposition_cases.why: obsolete but retained pending an archive/prune decision.

disposition_cases.name: durable-obsolete-archive
disposition_cases.why: policy chose to keep it for forensics.

disposition_cases.name: durable-obsolete-prune
disposition_cases.why: policy chose to prune past the retention window.
